name: Mushroom Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add mushrooms and green peppers to the skillet. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the green pepper is softened.
3. Meanwhile, beat eggs, egg whites, milk (or water), salt, and pepper together in a medium bowl.
4. When the vegetables are soft, transfer them to a plate.
5. Pour the egg mixture into the skillet, allowing room for it to cook.
6. Cook over medium heat until the edges of the omelet begin to set slightly.
7. Sprinkle the mushrooms and green peppers on top of the cooked egg.
8. Gently fold the omelet in half to enclose the filling.
9. Cook to desired doneness, then slide the finished omelet onto a serving platter.
10. Divide into portions and serve. Serves 2 to 4, depending on appetite.
Note: Feel free to substitute ingredients in the omelet as desired, such as adding Parmesan cheese or cooked sausage. You may also experiment with different vegetable combinations.
